factors.implementation_notes: Uses approximately 252 trading days and skips the most recent 21 trading days.
factors.source_citation_note: Classic medium-term momentum convention; exact paper source should be curated by Scholar Researcher.

factors.exact_formula: stdev(log(AdjClose[t]/AdjClose[t-1]) over trailing 30 trading days) * sqrt(252)
factors.implementation_notes: Lower realized volatility is treated as favorable in the ranking layer.
factors.source_citation_note: Standard realized volatility calculation; exact source note should be curated later.
